risk_title: Project Implementation Suspended Due to Political Instability
risk_summary: The Afghanistan Reconstruction Trust Fund (ARTF) component of the project was canceled, and IDA grants remain suspended due to the extraordinary political situation in Afghanistan, preventing effective project implementation.
evidence_quote: The Afghanistan Reconstruction Trust Fund (ARTF) in the project was canceled based on the consideration that the project cannot be effectively implemented under the current extraordinary situation in Afghanistan. Undisbursed IDA grants under this project will remain suspended until a decision is made by the World Bank.

risk_title: High Political and Governance Risk Rating
risk_summary: Political and governance risk remains rated as High at project approval, previous review, and current review, indicating persistent fragility in the operating environment.
evidence_quote: Risk Category: Political and Governance - Rating at Approval: High, Previous Rating: High, Current Rating: High

risk_title: High Institutional Capacity Risk for Implementation
risk_summary: Institutional capacity for implementation and sustainability is rated High across all review periods, reflecting governance fragility and weak institutional structures needed to execute the project.
evidence_quote: Risk Category: Institutional Capacity for Implementation and Sustainability - Rating at Approval: High, Previous Rating: High, Current Rating: High

risk_summary: Stakeholder risk has escalated from Substantial at approval to High in previous and current ratings, indicating emerging tensions or challenges with stakeholder engagement in the fragile context.
evidence_quote: Risk Category: Stakeholders - Rating at Approval: Substantial, Previous Rating: High, Current Rating: High

risk_title: PPP Regulatory Framework Destabilized by Government Amendment
risk_summary: The PPP Law was amended in October 2020, causing the PPP Policy and Regulations indicator to shift from being met to unmet, indicating governance instability affecting the legal framework for project implementation.
evidence_quote: In October 2020, the PPP Law was amended and therefore this indicator is not met.
